name: GlobalTech Corp
summary: GlobalTech Corporation is a Nevada-based holding company operating telecommunications businesses in Pakistan through consolidated subsidiaries, including a 55% owned subsidiary WorldCALL Public's Long Distance & International network (LDI). The company provides broadband, fiber (FTTH), VOIP, DPLC, and related telecommunications services. It operates under licenses regulated by the Pakistan Telecommunications Authority (PTA) and trades on U.S. markets under ticker GLTK.
